title: HTML Link Semantics, Base URLs, Relations, and Discovery Decisions · Contract Lens: Reference Rejection
summary: Every href becomes a page request; base, rel, hreflang, media, downloads, forms, non-navigation links, and nofollow policy are ignored. Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler ts reference rejection increment in semantic link-discovery ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice,…
objectives: Classify empty, fragment-only, mailto, tel, javascript, data, malformed, credentialed, and unsupported references without fetching.
Interpret rel tokens, download, target, media, hreflang, canonical, alternate, and nofollow under an explicit discovery policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Classify empty, fragment-only, mailto, tel, javascript, data, malformed, credentialed, and unsupported references without fetching.

At Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Reference Rejection model · Theory Reference Rej…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory TypeScript team handles case 7833 during an isolated browser, package, and restore smoke. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to classify link-bearing elements, base and relation semantics, rejected references, and discovery provenance; URL, robots, body, parser, frontier, privacy, accessibility, and report budgets stay explicit; then change one test, mutation, package, browser binary, container, capacity, incident, restore, rollback, or residual-risk condition and reconcile release evidence. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify empty, fragment-only, mailto, tel, javascript, data, malformed, credentialed, and unsupported references without fetching.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Reference Rejection model · Theory Reference Rej…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Every URL constructor success indicates a fetchable page.
